name: Daily Intimate Wash Aloe Vera & Calendula
description: FEMFRESH DAILY SOAP-FREE INTIMATE WASH ALOE VERA & CALENDULA 250ML
long_description:
Introduce your intimate skin to the gentle care of Femfresh Daily Intimate Wash, a 250ml bottle of freshness that's specially designed for your daily use. Made with a blend of Aloe Vera and Calendula extracts, this soap-free wash ensures a soothing and gentle experience that leaves your intimate skin feeling fresh and comfortable all day. With 94% Natural Origin ingredients, this intimate wash is a gentle choice for your personal care needs.

The Femfresh Daily Intimate Wash is pH and microbiome balanced, and works in tune with your body, keeping your skin's microbiome balanced and healthy. It is dermatologically and gynaecologicaly tested, ensuring its suitability for everyday use. Femfresh Daily Intimate Wash, with its soothing and refreshing properties, is the ideal addition to your daily self-care routine. It is also beneficial for those experiencing incontinence, offering a gentl and effective solution to maintain freshness and comfort. Always remember, your intimate skin deserves the same level of care and attention as the rest of your body, and Femfresh is here to provide that. Please note that this product is for external use only.

  • FRESHNESS & COMFORT EVERY DAY: Femfresh Daily Intimate Wash is formulated with Aloe Vera & Calendula extracts to help keep intimate skin fresh and comfortable throughout the day.

  • GENTLE, SOAP-FREE FORMULA: The pH-balanced and soap-free formula works in harmony with intimate skin, making it suitable for daily use.

  • GENTLE & KIND TO INTIMATE SKIN: Carefully formulated, this delicate formula cleanses initimate skin and helps to maintain skin's natural microbiome while leaving you feeling fresh and confident.

  • PH BALANCED FORMULA: Designed to match the natural pH of intimate skin, helping to maintain balance and freshness as part of your daily hygiene routine.

  • MADE WITH 94% NATURAL ORIGIN INGREDIENTS: Created with naturally derived ingredients, including soothing extracts, to provide a gentle and refreshing cleanse.

  • Proudly Australian Made.
ingredients: Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Calendula Officinalis Flower Extract, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Extract, Glycerin, Lactic Acid, Sodium Lactate, Triethyl Citrate, Parfum, Maltodextrin, Polyquaternium-39, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Linalool, Limonene, CI 14720, CI 15510.

long_description:
Join the TOM Organic revolution. Our TOM Organic Mini Tampons are a harmonious blend of comfort, care and awareness. Made from 100% certified organic cotton, these tampons offer the softest feel with the utmost respect for your body and the environment. The compact mini size, suitable for a light flow, provides discreet and effective absorption while promoting balance with nature. Whether you're juggling a busy work week, playing your favourite sports or just relaxing at home, TOM Organic's tampons are designed to empower you without compromise. TOM Organic is more than just a period care brand; it's a lifestyle choice that celebrates empowerment, sustainability and wellness. name: Advanced Digital (dual Hormone) Ovulation Test
description: CLEARBLUE ADVANCED DIGITAL (DUAL HORMONE) OVULATION TEST 10 PACK
long_description:
Trying for a baby? Clearblue Advanced Digital Ovulation kit doubles your chances of getting pregnant (1). It is the only test to typically identify 4 or more fertile days (2) when you have the best chances to get pregnant naturally each cycle. By accurately tracking 2 key fertility hormones, estrogen and luteinising hormone, this ovulation test not only identifies 2 peak fertility days, but also additional high fertility days before that. This means you have more opportunities to get pregnant - at least twice as many as with any other ovulation test (2). Unlike basal body temperature (BBT) charting, ovulation predictor kits detect the rise in luteinisning hormone (LH) that rises prior to ovulation to accurately detect the days BEFORE, and not AFTER ovulation. Unlike other ovulation tests which track LH only, this Clearblue ovulation test also detects estrogen which rises prior to the LH surge to detect more fertile days. Because your partner's sperm can survive in your body for up to 5 days, you can actually become pregnant by having intercourse during the days leading up to ovulation. Have intercourse on high and peak fertility days to maximise your chances of getting pregnant. The clear digital display gives you a Clearblue smiley face when it identifies your best days to get pregnant so you know your body is ready. Clearblue Advanced Digital tested over 99% accurate at detecting the LH surge. (1) In first cycle of use, vs not using ovulation tests.(2) In a study of 87 women, 4 or more fertile days were identified in 80% of cycles using actual cycle length (2012).#advanced #digital #clearblue #ovulation test

  • Clear results, the unique Clearblue 'smiley face' appears on your fertile days: make love on High and Peak Fertility days to maximise your chances of getting pregnant

  • Identifies additional high fertility days that no other test can, so you have more opportunities to get pregnant

long_description:
Great value pack if you are trying for a baby: contains 10 Clearblue Digital Ovulation Tests and 1 Clearblue Ultra Early Pregnancy Test. You can also track your cycles in our FREE app, designed for use with Clearblue Advanced Digital or Digital Ovulation Tests. This simple at home ovulation kit is proven to help you get pregnant, by accurately pinpointing your 2 best days to get pregnant each cycle. The ovulation stick shows a clear smiley face on the digital display when your LH surge has been detected, so you know that today and tomorrow are your best 2 days to try for a baby. When trying to get pregnant it's good advice to take folic acid or pre-pregnancy vitamins, but it's really important to have sex at the right time during your cycle. The days leading up to and including the day of ovulation are the only days each cycle when a woman can get pregnant. Unlike basal body temperature (BBT) charting, ovulation predictor kits detect the rise in luteinising hormone (LH test) - a key fertility hormone that rises prior to ovulation - to accurately detect the days BEFORE, and not AFTER ovulation. Test to see if you are pregnant using the Clearblue Ultra Early Pregnancy Test. You can use our early detection pregnancy test from 6 days before your missed period (5 days before you expect your period) (1). Clearblue Ultra Early pregnancy test is ultra-sensitive (test sensitivity 10mIU/ml) - no test can tell you sooner. With the accuracy you expect from Clearblue Pregnancy Tests, this home kit is over 99% accurate from the day you expect your period. (1) 'Missed period' is the day after you expect your period. 79% of pregnant results can be detected 6 days before the missed period.(2) vs not using any method. To find out if your phone is compatible and if the Clearblue Period & Cycle Tracker app is available in the country you live in, visit: clearblue.com/connectivity #digital #digital ultra early #early detection #clearblue #ovulation test #pregnancy test

name: Early Detection Pregnancy Test
description: COLES EARLY DETECTION PREGNANCY TEST 3PK
long_description:
6 days early

Over 99% accurate*

Result as quick as 1 minute^

Mid-stream test

Coles Early Detection Pregnancy Test works by detecting levels of the pregnancy hormone human Chorionic Gonadotropin (hCG) as low as 10mIU/ mL, allowing to test up to 6 days before your missed period. It is over 99% accurate *when tested from the day of your missed period. ^A positive (pregnant) result may appear in 1 minute when testing from the day of your missed period. Always wait 3 to 5 minutes to confirm a negative (not pregnant) result.

If you test negative (not pregnant) before your missed period, but believe you may be pregnant, you should re-test in a few days time or the day after your missed period. If you test positive (pregnant) but think you are not pregnant, you should consult your doctor.

All results should be confirmed by a healthcare practitioner before making decisions about future medical care.

name: Petroleum Jelly Original

long_description:
100% pure petroleum jelly. triple- purified. Purity guaranteed. Gentle on skin, hypoallergenic and non - comedogenic (won't clog pores). A soothing dressing for: nappy rash, chafing, sore lips, minor burns, cuts and rough hands. Protects your skin from windburn and chapping and helps reduce the appearance of fine, dry lines on your skin. Vaseline Petroleum Jelly is the original wonder jelly. Vaseline has long been used to manage symptoms of many severe skin conditions. It literally melts into the skin, flowing into the tiny cracks caused by dryness where moisture is needed most. In this way Vaseline acts as an extremely powerful skin moisturiser to provide a barrier against water loss from already dry skin and help protect against the effects of weather and exposure. Our petroleum jelly is triple-purified to be 100% pure. Vaseline believes that truly healthy skin starts with deep moisture. It's not something you get by masking problems or through quick fixes. We know this because we are the original skin experts. Founded in 1870 by Robert Chesebrough, Vaseline has been safely helping care for skin for over 140 years. It is our goal to make the original, triple-purified Vaseline Petroleum Jelly the core of every product because there is no jelly with a longer history of locking in moisture to strengthen skin barrier and protect dry skin.
  • Restores the appearance of dry skin.

name: Petroleum Jelly Original

long_description:
Vaseline Petroleum Jelly is the original wonder jelly. Perfect for both skin care and lip care, not only is it clinically proven to help restore dry skin, but it can also be used as an effective lip balm, helping relieve chapped lips by replenishing moisture.

Made of 100% pure petroleum jelly, Vaseline is triple purified to ensure that it's gentle on your skin, hypoallergenic and non-comedogenic (won't clog your pores). It makes a soothing dressing for nappy rash, chafing, sore lips, minor burns, cuts and rough hands. Moreover, it protects your skin from windburn and chapping and helps reduce the appearance of fine, dry lines.

Vaseline literally melts into the skin, flowing into the tiny cracks caused by dryness where moisture is needed most. That's why Vaseline acts as a powerful skin moisturiser, providing a barrier against water loss from already dry skin and helping protect against the effects of weather and exposure.

Vaseline believes that truly healthy skin starts with deep moisture. It's not something you get by masking problems or using quick fixes. As the original skin experts, we've been safely helping care for skin for over 140 years. It is our goal to make the original, triple-purified Vaseline Petroleum the core of every product because there is no jelly with a longer history of locking in moisture to strengthen skin barrier and protect dry skin.
  • Vaseline Petroleum Jelly is clinically proven to restore the appearance of dry and cracked skin

  • Vaseline jelly can be used for both lip care and skin care, relieving dry skin and chapped lips by replenishing moisture

  • Our petroleum jelly also helps soothe minor cuts, scrapes and burns, and protects from the drying effects of wind and cold weather

  • Made with 100% pure petroleum jelly that has been triple purified and dermatologically tested for a moisuriser that delivers

  • Vaseline jelly can be used a lip balm to rescue dry lips and moisturiser to leave skin moisturised and protected

  • Vaseline is committed to understanding and supporting skin health for all types of skin so that everybody can enjoy healthy skin.

name: For Men Hair Removal Cream
description: NADS FOR MEN:HAIR REMOVAL CREAM:200:ML
long_description:
Nad's for Men Hair Removal Cream delivers painless hair removal in as little as 3 minutes. The cream contains aloe vera to soothe the skin, whilst the active agents target the hair shaft for effective and smooth removal.

Why you need it:
Painless, effective hair removal at home
Wipe away in 3 minutes
Ideal for chest, back, arms and legs
  • HAIR REMOVAL MADE FOR MEN: Nad's for Men Hair Removal Cream delivers painless hair removal for men, with results that last longer than shaving. The extra strength cream is formulated especially for coarse body hair and is effective in as little as 3 minutes.

  • QUICK AND PAINLESS: Fast acting male depilatory cream, painlessly removes body hair just below the skin surface with added soothing Aloe Vera for quick, painless hair removal at home.

  • HOW TO: Step 1. Apply the cream generously in a thick, even layer to completely cover the hairStep 2. Leave cream on the area for at least 3 minutesStep 3. Using a soft cloth, test a small area for hair removal. If hair does not come away easily, leave the cream on a few more minutes, without exceeding 10 minutes in totalStep 4. Wipe cream and hair away using a soft clothStep 5. Thoroughly rinse treated area with water and gently dry

  • FAST ACTION FORMULA: Leave cream on for at least 3 minutes. If hair doesn't come away easily, leave the cream on for a few minutes without exceeding 10 minutes in total. Wipe cream and hair away using a soft cloth.

  • NAD'S FOR MEN HAIR REMOVAL CREAM: Suitable for all skin types. Nad's For Men are PETA certified for cruelty free hair removal.

description: TRISHAVE 3 IN 1 SHAVING CREAM FOR WOMEN 100G
long_description:
Smart Shaving Solution for Sensitive Skin with Tea Tree Oil. Helps prevent shaving rash
Enjoy the difference of our 3in1 anti-rash, soap-free Tea Tree formula-uniquely designed for sensitive skinon legs, bikini line, and underarms.

More than just making shaving comfortable, TriShave actively helps prevent shaving rash, skin irritation, redness, and ingrown hairs by cleansing, protecting, and moisturising-all while you shave.

TriShave 3in1 anti-rash Shave Crème delivers 3 benefits in one formula:
1. Cleanses & Softens- Gently cleanses skin and softens hair as you massage the non-foaming formula into your skin.
2 .Soothing Shave - Skin-friendly conditioners and moisturisers form a protective layer, reducing friction between your skin and the blade.
Helps prevent shaving rash, redness, cuts, and irritation, minimising ingrown hairs.Enriched with Tea Tree & Rose Oils, known for their soothing and anti-inflammatory benefits.
3. Moisturises - Hydrates and protects, leaving skin soft, smooth, and rehydrated.
Eliminates the need for multiple products

  • Shaving with TriShave is easy and mess free.
  • Convenient for a tidy-up anytime-no need to shave in the shower.
  • And when you do, TriShave works beautifully in the bath or shower
  • Recommended by Dermatologists

  • Australian made & Owned
  • Tried and trusted since 1997
  • Not tested on animals

TriShave is compatible with most razors, disposable razors, and shavers - helping to reduce razor blade friction and protect sensitive areas from shaving rash and irritation.
Unlike traditional shaving gel, our non-foaming formula offers a cleaner, more precise shave without the mess - simplifying your skincare routine.

TriShave leaves your skin with a luxurious satin feel-making shaving a treat, without irritation.

name: 3 In 1 Anti-rash Shaving Creme Men
description: TRISHAVE 3 IN 1 ANTI-RASH SHAVING CREAM FOR MEN 100G
long_description:
Smart Shaving Solution for Sensitive Skin with Tea Tree oil, soap-free/moisturising
Experience the difference with our unique 3in1 anti-rash formula—specifically designed to help prevent shaving rash, razor burn, ingrown hairs, and skin irritation caused by shaving.
Ideal for sensitive, acne-prone, or easily irritated skin, as well as coarse, curly, or thick facial hair.
Also suitable for those with normal skin who simply want it to look and feel healthy.
Whether you shave at the basin or in the shower, TriShave is perfect for face, head, legs and full body shaving.
TriShave is not a traditional shaving foam or shaving gel.
TriShave's non-foaming, soap-free 3in1 formula is a smart, skin-friendly alternative.
Enriched with skin conditioners, moisturisers, and soothing Tea Tree Oil & Lavender Oil, known for its anti-inflammatory benefits.

TriShave 3in1 Anti-rash Shave Crème delivers 3 benefits in one formula:
1.Pre-Shave: Cleanses and softens facial hair as you massage the soothing cream into your skin - no brush needed. The non-foaming cover helps you see where you're shaving, ensuring precision and preparing for a closer, more comfortable shave.
2.Soothing Shave: Creates an extra protective layer to reduce razor friction, minimise ingrown hairs, and help prevent shaving rash.
3.Moisturiser: Hydrates and nourishes your skin, leaving it soft, refreshed, and healthy. Makes your daily skincare regime simple and effective.
  • Hypoallergenic – Dermatologically tested on sensitive skin
  • Recommended by Dermatologists
  • Non-aerosol tube—perfect for travel and carry-on approved
  • Australian Made & Owned
  • Tried and trusted since 1994
  • Not tested on animals

Compatible with most razors, disposable razors, and shavers — helping to protect against razor burn and reduce razor blade friction.
TriShave takes the irritation out of shaving.

name: Shower Power Max Hair Removal Cream
description: NAIR SHOWER POWER MAX HAIR REMOVAL CREAM  312G
long_description:
Experience smooth, touchable skin with Nair Shower Power Max Hair Removal Cream. This powerful in-shower formula removes hair quickly and effortlessly, making it an ideal addition to your routine. Designed for legs and body, it effectively removes even coarse, thick hair in as little as 3 minutes. Simply apply to dry skin, wait a minute, and step into the shower while the formula works to break down hair below the surface.

Enriched with soothing lavender and Vitamin E, this product gives of a pleasant aroma. Nair Shower Power Max is a convenient, mess-free solution; it's perfect for those with a busy lifestyle, offering an easy alternative to shaving without the hassle of razors. With over 80 years of expertise, Nair is a trusted name in depilatory creams. This dermatologist-tested formula provides a reliable and effective way to remove hair.

For best results, apply an even layer, wait for one minute before stepping into the shower, leave for a further 2 minutes whilst you shower and then wipe away (always follow directions for use on pack). Designed for both normal and coarse hair, this cream delivers smooth, hair-free skin with minimal effort.

  • Fast and effective hair removal

  • Enriched with soothing lavender and Vitamin E

  • Dermatologist tested

  • Works in just 3 minutes

name: Moisturising Body Lotion Intensive Care Cocoa Glow
description: VASELINE MOISTURISING BODY LOTION INTENSIVE CARE COCOA GLOW 750ML
long_description:
Vaseline Intensive Care Cocoa Glow Lotion moisturises skin for a beautiful, radiant glow. Made with pure cocoa butter and ultra-hydrating lipids, this body moisturiser for dry skin helps keep your skin looking healthy and hydrated - for a difference you can feel.

Daily exposure to environmental triggers (like wind, lack of humidity and sun) can cause your skin's natural moisture barrier to break down, allowing water to escape the skin. But the ultra-hydrating lipids in our Cocoa Glow lotion fortify the skin barrier and replenish moisture to allow your skin's natural barrier to recover.

Vaseline Intensive Care Cocoa Glow Lotion is clinically tested to provide 90% more moisture (vs. untreated skin). It absorbs fast without leaving any residue or greasy feel. What's more, it provides 48 hours of moisture for the nourishing care your skin craves. Use this dermatologist-tested body lotion daily on dry and rough skin for stronger, noticeably healthier-looking skin. Simply apply to your skin, preferably after a shower, for long-lasting moisture.

This Vaseline lotion bottle is made of 50% recycled plastic. Vaseline has a range of products to help restore, soothe and moisturise all skin types. We believe skin care is essential for well-being. That's why Vaseline is working towards giving everybody, everywhere, access to the skin care they need.
  • Vaseline Intensive Care Cocoa Glow Body Lotion is made with pure cocoa butter to moisturise skin for a beautiful, radiant glow

  • Our body lotion for dry skin is formulated with ultra-hydrating lipids that fortify the skin barrier and replenish moisture

  • This body moisturiser for dry and dull skin is clinically tested to provide 90% more moisture vs. untreated skin

  • Our fast-acting lotion absorbs quickly to leave your skin moisturised without feeling greasy

  • The perfect body lotion for daily skin care - just apply to your skin for 48h moisture and noticeably healthier-looking skin

  • Vaesline is dedicated to helping everyone get better care for their skin through our global partnership with Direct Relief.

In fact, there's hardly a mood in society that cannot be moved by fragrance. And there's barely a person on earth who can't be affected by the right scent. Each of our fragrance combinations is specially designed to unleash a mood, whether you want to be energised or refreshed, uplifted or soothed. And that's why we ask each and every one of you 'How do you want to feel?'

name: Advance Body Wash Sensitive
description: DOVE ADVANCED BODY WASH SENSITIVE 700ML
long_description:
If you have dry, sensitive skin, you're in for a treat. Dove Advanced Care Sensitive Body Wash ensures that care for sensitive skin starts in the shower. Dermatologically tested on sensitive skin, this fragrance-free shower gel gently cleanses and relieves dryness in just one shower.

Unlike ordinary body washes, Dove Advanced Care is made with 24HR Renewing MicroMoisture, a groundbreaking new technology that deposits millions of tiny but powerfully moisturising droplets onto your skin. Instead of getting washed off, they are absorbed and work with your skin's natural renewal process. This strengthens your skin's barrier, helping to retain and boost moisture even after you shower.

Our moisturising body wash helps you turn every shower into an act of self-care, giving you 24 hours of replenished, lotion-soft skin. Free from sulfate SLES, this mild and soap-free formula uses a blend of naturally derived cleansers and skin-natural nutrients to gently cleanse your skin without disrupting its microbiome. It's also PETA Vegan Approved and packaged in 50% recycled plastic bottles.

To reveal instantly lotion-soft skin, pump a generous amount of Dove Advanced Care Sensitive Body Wash into your hands and massage all over your body. Take a moment to enjoy the rich and creamy lather before rinsing thoroughly.

At Dove, we envision a world where beauty is a source of confidence, not anxiety. Our mission to help the next generation of women develop a positive relationship with the way they look - reaching over of a billion young people with self-esteem education by 2030.
  • Dove Advanced Care Sensitive Body Wash gently cleanses and deeply moisturises the skin, with 24HR Renewing MicroMoisture that leaves your skin replenished and lotion-soft for 24 hours

  • Our fragrance-free body wash gently cleanses and nourishes sensitive skin in just one shower

  • With naturally derived cleansers, skin-natural nutrients and no sulfate SLES, this shower gel produces a rich lather that's gentle on your skin and its microbiome

  • Our body wash for sensitive skin is infused with millions of tiny but powerfully moisturising droplets to rejuvenate your skin's natural moisture barrier

  • Featuring plant-based moisturisers, this microbiome-gentle body wash is dermatologically tested and approved

  • This sulfate SLES-free body wash is PETA Vegan Approved and packaged in 50% recycled plastic bottles, so you can feel good about switching to Dove.

name: Fresh Care Body Wash
description: DOVE FRESH CARE BODY WASH 1LITRE
long_description:
If you're looking for a body wash that is mild and gentle and cares for your skin, give Dove Fresh Care Body Wash a try. Developed with naturally derived cleansers and 0% sulfate SLES, this soap-free moisturising body wash works to cleanse and nourish your skin, leaving it soft and smooth in just one shower.

Our shower gel doesn't strip away your skin's natural moisture, keeping your skin hydrated and soft. It's gentle on your microbiome (your skin's living protective layer) and made with a plant-based moisturiser and moisturising cream, helping you turn every shower into an act of self-care.

Where an ordinary body wash might leave your skin feeling dry, tight and irritated, Dove leaves it feeling soft and cared for before you've even stepped out of the shower. It is also PETA Vegan Approved and comes in a 70% recycled plastic bottle.

Pump a generous amount of Dove Fresh Care Body Wash into wet hands, a washcloth or a loofah. Massage all over your body, then rinse off to reveal soft, smooth skin. Your skin is most receptive to lotions and serums when it's slightly damp, making post-shower the perfect time to lock in moisture. Apply your favourite Dove moisturiser as soon as you step out of the shower - your skin will look and feel softer, as well as instantly more nourished.

At Dove, we envision a world where beauty is a source of confidence, not anxiety. Our mission is to help the next generation of women develop a positive relationship with the way they look - reaching over of a billion young people with self-esteem education by 2030.
  • Mild and caring, Dove Fresh Care Body Wash gently cleanses and provides nourishment for instantly soft, smooth skin

  • This body cleanser helps your skin retain its natural moisture rather than stripping it away

  • Produces a rich lather that doesn't dry out your skin like ordinary body washes

  • Made with naturally derived gentle cleansers and 0% sulfate SLES for a refreshing shower experience

  • Featuring a plant-based moisturiser and moisturising cream, our shower gel effectively washes away dirt while nourishing your skin's microbiome

  • This microbiome-gentle body wash is PETA Vegan Approved and packaged in a 70% recycled plastic bottle, so you can feel good about switching to Dove.

description: CETAPHIL GENTLE EXFOLIATING SA CLEANSER 236ML
long_description:
This cleanser reveals softer, smoother skin and a more even skin tone in just 1 week thanks to a unique blend of Salicylic Acid, Mandelic Acid and Gluconolactone. This gentle chemical exfoliator promotes  surface skin renewal for a more refined texture and radiant-looking skin after just 1 use. In fact, daily use can help improve the resilience of sensitive skin over time. Plus a blend of Niacinamide (Vitamin B3), Panthenol (Vitamin B5) and Glycerin hydrates and moisturises skin to help soothe and preserve the skin barrier. This foaming gel cleanser is hypoallergenic, fragrance free, paraben free and won't clog pores, specifically developed to be gentle on sensitive skin.
  • CETAPHIL GENTLE EXFOLIATING SA CLEANSER: Gently cleanses and exfoliates to promote surface skin cell renewal for smooth, even and radiant-looking skin after just 1 use

  • GENTLE DAILY EXFOLIATION: Gentle and non-irritating chemical exfoliation, suitable for daily use on sensitive skin without disrupting the skin barrier

  • IMPROVE TEXTURE AND TONE: Formulated with a unique triple acid blend of Salicylic Acid, Mandelic Acid and Gluconolactone, designed to remove excess oil, improve skin tone and retain skin's moisture while exfoliating

  • CLINICALLY TESTED ON SENSITIVE SKIN: The foaming gel formula is hypoallergenic, fragrance free, paraben free and won't clog pores

  • DEFENDS AGAINST 5 SIGNS OF SKIN SENSITIVITY: Dryness, irritation, roughness, tightness and a weakened skin moisture barrier
ingredients: Aqua, Glycerin, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Coco-Glucoside, Gluconolactone, Betaine, Peg-120 Methyl Glucose Dioleate, Sodium Cocoamphoacetate, Glycereth-26, Panthenol, Mandelic Acid, Sodium Citrate, Sodium Hydroxide, Phenoxyethanol, Citric Acid, Ethylhexylglycerin, Disodium Edta, Niacinamide, Salicylic Acid, Pantolactone, Tocopherol, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil. name: Body Wash Ice Chill
description: LYNX BODY WASH ICE CHILL 400ML
long_description:
Lynx Ice Chill Body Wash delivers a powerful blast of icy freshness that keeps you smelling irresistible all day. This 3-in-1 body, face and hair wash has you covered with a long-lasting iced mint and lemon fragrance, blended with the signature Lynx effect to leave you wanting more. Better still, our dermatologically tested formula contains naturally derived ingredients and plant-based moisturisers to hydrate your skin every time you shower. Squeeze a generous amount into your hand, work into a lather, massage all over and rinse thoroughly to reveal clean, fresh-smelling skin. Our body cleanser is made in Australia with renewable grid electricity and comes in recyclable bottles - please recycle. Vibing with this body wash for men? Lynx Ice Chill is also available in antiperspirant and body spray formats. If you're ready to mix things up, check out the rest of our body wash range and find your next favourite. Whatever your vice, we've got the shower gel to give you that epic burst of freshness so you feel charged up and ready for whatever comes your way.

  • Lynx Ice Chill Body Wash leaves you smelling irresistible with a long-lasting iced mint and lemon fragrance

  • Our dermatologically tested 3-in-1 formula washes away odour-causing bacteria, giving your skin an all-day fresh and clean feel

  • This body, face and hair wash contains naturally derived ingredients and plant-based moisturisers

name: Essential Hydrate Body Wash
description: DOVE ESSENTIAL HYDRATE BODY WASH 400ML
long_description:
If you're looking for a body wash that is mild and gentle and cares for your skin, give Dove Triple Hydrate Body Wash a try. Developed with naturally derived cleansers and 0% sulfate SLES, this soap-free moisturising body wash works to cleanse and nourish your skin, leaving it soft and smooth in just one shower.

Our shower gel doesn't strip away your skin's natural moisture, keeping your skin hydrated and soft. It's gentle on your microbiome (your skin's living protective layer) and made with a plant-based moisturiser and moisturising cream, helping you turn every shower into an act of self-care.

Where an ordinary body wash might leave your skin feeling dry, tight and irritated, Dove leaves it feeling soft and cared for before you've even stepped out of the shower. It is also PETA Vegan Approved and comes in a 25% recycled plastic bottle.

Pump a generous amount of Dove Triple Hydrate Body Wash into wet hands, a washcloth or a loofah. Massage all over your body, then rinse off to reveal soft, smooth skin. Your skin is most receptive to lotions and serums when it's slightly damp, making post-shower the perfect time to lock in moisture. Apply your favourite Dove moisturiser as soon as you step out of the shower - your skin will look and feel softer, as well as instantly nourished.

At Dove, we envision a world where beauty is a source of confidence, not anxiety. Our mission is to help the next generation of women develop a positive relationship with the way they look - reaching over of a billion young people with self-esteem education by 2030.
  • Mild and caring, Dove Triple Hydrate Body Wash gently cleanses and provides nourishment for instantly soft, smooth skin

  • This body cleanser helps your skin retain its natural moisture rather than stripping it away

  • Produces a rich lather that doesn't dry out your skin like ordinary body washes

  • Made with naturally derived gentle cleansers and 0% sulfate SLES for a hydrating shower experience

  • Featuring a plant-based moisturiser and moisturising cream, our shower gel effectively washes away dirt while nourishing your skin's microbiome

  • This microbiome-gentle body wash is PETA Vegan Approved and packaged in a 25% recycled plastic bottle, so you can feel good about switching to Dove.

long_description:
Awaken your skin and invigorate your senses with Dove Advanced Care Rejuvenating Body Wash, turning every shower into a revitalising ritual. Dove blends all the nourishing care you love with real pomegranate juice and an energising lemon verbena scent, helping rejuvenate and revive your skin in just one shower.

Unlike ordinary body washes, Dove Advanced Care is made with 24HR Renewing MicroMoisture, a groundbreaking new technology that deposits millions of tiny but powerfully moisturising droplets onto your skin. Instead of getting washed off, they are absorbed and work with your skin's natural renewal process. This strengthens your skin's barrier, helping to retain and boost moisture even after you shower.

Our moisturising body wash helps you turn every shower into an act of self-care, giving you 24 hours of replenished, lotion-soft skin. Free from sulfate SLES, this mild and soap-free formula uses a blend of naturally derived cleansers and skin-natural nutrients to gently cleanse your skin without disrupting its microbiome. It's also PETA Vegan Approved and packaged in 50% recycled plastic bottles.

To reveal instantly lotion-soft skin, pump a dollop of Dove Advanced Care Rejuvenating Body Wash onto your hands and smooth the indulgent lather over your skin. Take a moment to enjoy the fruity fragrance before rinsing thoroughly.

Want to amp up the invigorating sensation of your shower with a simple trick? After rinsing off your shower gel, slowly lower the temperature of the water. A splash of cold water wakes up your skin and your senses.

name: Essential Fresh Care Body Wash
description: DOVE ESSENTIAL FRESH CARE BODY WASH 400ML
long_description:
If you're looking for a body wash that is mild and gentle and cares for your skin, give Dove Fresh Care Body Wash a try. Developed with naturally derived cleansers and 0% sulfate SLES, this soap-free moisturising body wash works to cleanse and nourish your skin, leaving it soft and smooth in just one shower.

Our shower gel doesn't strip away your skin's natural moisture, keeping your skin hydrated and soft. It's gentle to your microbiome (your skin's living protective layer) and made with a plant-based moisturiser and moisturising cream, helping you turn every shower into an act of self-care.

Where an ordinary body wash might leave your skin feeling dry, tight and irritated, Dove leaves it feeling soft and cared for before you've even stepped out of the shower. It is also PETA Vegan Approved and comes in a 25% recycled plastic bottle.

Pump a generous amount of Dove Fresh Care Body Wash into wet hands, a washcloth or a loofah. Massage all over your body, then rinse off to reveal soft, smooth skin. Your skin is most receptive to lotions and serums when it's slightly damp, making post-shower the perfect time to lock in moisture. Apply your favourite Dove moisturiser as soon as you step out of the shower - your skin will look and feel softer, as well as instantly more nourished.

At Dove, we envision a world where beauty is a source of confidence, not anxiety. Our mission is to help the next generation of women develop a positive relationship with the way they look - reaching over of a billion young people with self-esteem education by 2030.

  • This body cleanser helps your skin retain its natural moisture rather than stripping it away

  • Made with naturally derived gentle cleansers and 0% sulfate SLES for a refreshing shower experience

  • Featuring a plant-based moisturiser and moisturising cream, our shower gel effectively washes away dirt while nourishing your skin's microbiome
